title: Gin’s Loyalty Breaks Under Krieg’s Cruelty
scene: On pages 12–15, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Gin is ordered to kill Sanji, but his debt and sympathy clash with Don Krieg’s brutal command.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: So you managed to get away,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Do you not want to fight or what!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do I want to fight...? Ha, I don't need to.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The only thing I need in a battle are methods which to kill you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That is true might as a human!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: On the other hand, you, who can only charge straight-ahead without using your head, are equivalent to a monkey!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Understrate monkeys and you'll get clawed!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: gyahahaha! His bones are all cracked by now, I bet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn it! If it wasn't for that shield-wearing bastard, then Sanji would...!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: He's already received 10 blows from those iron balls!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Those... skewed Dango of yours ain't... so great...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn it, he's freakin' strong as hell...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: time to put an end to this!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
